[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010011001 4
1 001111110 6
2 000110111 5
3 010110101 5
4 101001101 5
5 111111011 8
6 110111110 7
7 001101111 6
